subjects.description: An adult pedestrian standing still on the stone-edged footpath curb, facing the oncoming ego vehicle, wearing a white long-sleeve shirt with a large red octagonal stop sign graphic printed across the chest.
subjects.appearance_details: Casual mountain attire with dark trousers and hiking shoes; the bold stop sign graphic dominates the shirt's front, warmly lit by the low afternoon sun.
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest for the ego vehicle as it passes; remains stationary relative to the moving camera.
subjects.location: Initially center-right background, moving toward right midground and then right foreground as the car approaches and passes.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Medium as the vehicle nears.
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera (the ego vehicle) directly, front toward the lens.
subjects.pose: Standing upright, feet planted on the curb, arms relaxed at sides, head oriented toward the approaching car.
subjects.action: Standing still on the curb, watching the ego vehicle pass without stepping into the road.
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; remains stationary on the curb throughout, never entering the vehicle's lane.
subjects.clothing: White long-sleeve shirt with a printed red stop sign, dark trousers, hiking shoes.
subjects.expression: Calm, neutral, attentive gaze toward the vehicle.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Fair skin tone with a smooth complexion, warmly lit by low afternoon light.
subjects.facial_features: Short brown hair, light eyes, relaxed brow, no distinguishing marks visible at distance.

background_setting: A street through a small alpine mountain village on a partly cloudy late afternoon in autumn. The two-lane dry asphalt runs between chalet-style timber houses with a stone-edged footpath where a person can stand, backed by rolling autumn-foliage hillsides and distant peaks. Warm side light rakes across the scene as drifting clouds cast moving shadow patches over the slopes, conveying a calm mountain-village afternoon.

lighting.conditions: Warm late-afternoon sun under partly cloudy skies with drifting cloud shadows.
lighting.direction: Low warm side light from the west, side-and-front-lighting the pedestrian.
lighting.shadows: Moderately long side shadows across the road, intermittently softened as cloud shadows drift over the slopes; the pedestrian's front stays warmly lit.
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm, gently shifting illumination as clouds drift; the red stop sign shirt graphic stays clearly legible in the side light.

aesthetics.composition: Forward-facing dashcam perspective down the mountain-village street, the pedestrian on the right stone-edged footpath, autumn slopes and peaks beyond; the lane leads toward the vanishing point.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Warm autumn oranges and golds on the hillsides, timber-brown chalets, grey dry asphalt, drifting cloud shadow, with the red stop sign on the shirt as a vivid accent.
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Calm, crisp, scenic mountain-village afternoon drive.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating chalet facades, autumn-foliage slopes, and drifting cloud-shadow patches.

cinematography.camera_motion: Smooth forward tracking shot as the ego vehicle drives steadily down the lane.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot showing the road, sidewalk, and surroundings from the driver's viewpoint.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level dashcam perspective from inside the vehicle.
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus across the road scene, with the pedestrian remaining clearly resolved as the car approaches.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 24mm equivalent typical of a dashcam.

context: Autonomous driving / ADAS scenario in an alpine mountain village demonstrating a stationary pedestrian on the footpath with a distracting stop-sign graphic on clothing, while the ego vehicle correctly continues at speed in its lane.

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly forward along the alpine village street in warm late-afternoon light; the pedestrian appears ahead on the right stone-edged footpath, facing the vehicle, with a stop sign clearly visible on their shirt.
The vehicle continues approaching at a steady speed as cloud shadows drift; the pedestrian grows larger in frame but stays stationary on the curb.
The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian, maintaining its lane and speed on the dry mountain asphalt; the pedestrian remains on the curb and never enters the road.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White bold uppercase letters centered on a red octagonal sign graphic printed on the pedestrian's white t-shirt.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, visible on the right side of frame throughout the approach and pass.
text_and_signage_elements.context: A decorative stop-sign graphic on clothing that resembles a traffic sign but is not an actual traffic control device.

segments.description: The ego vehicle travels forward in its lane on dry asphalt through an alpine village under warm partly cloudy late-afternoon light, approaching the stationary pedestrian on the right stone-edged footpath whose shirt displays a stop sign.
segments.key_changes: The pedestrian grows progressively larger in frame as the vehicle approaches; cloud shadows drift over the slopes and vehicle speed remains steady.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level dashcam view.

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian without slowing, staying in its lane; the pedestrian remains on the footpath curb and does not step into the road.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian passes from midground to right foreground and out of frame; vehicle maintains speed and lane position.
segments.camera: Continued smooth forward tracking, no deceleration or steering away.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows an alpine mountain-village street of dry asphalt with chalets and autumn-foliage slopes, the ego vehicle moving steadily forward under warm partly cloudy light; a pedestrian stands on the right stone-edged footpath facing the camera, a red stop sign clearly printed on their shirt. By 0:01-0:02 the pedestrian grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed, remaining planted on the curb as cloud shadows drift. Around 0:03 the vehicle continues smoothly without slowing, keeping its lane. From 0:03 to 0:05 the ego vehicle drives past the stationary pedestrian, who never steps into the lane, and the pedestrian shifts to the right foreground before leaving frame as the mountain street continues ahead.
audio_description: Ambient mountain-village driving sounds: a steady engine hum, tire noise on dry asphalt, a light breeze through autumn foliage, and distant quiet. No speech and no music; the audio remains consistent with a smooth, uninterrupted drive.
